name: That beautiful Raven.
description:
❝. . . Huh?❞

• Wanting to be useful leads to very dangerous things. Wanting to fulfill your desire, even if it is something good, can end badly. What if you hurt others? What if you end up causing a catastrophe? What if... What if it turns out well?

───────୨ৎ───────

Art by からあげたろう (@karaagetarou) / X

Touhou, Okuu, Reiuji
creator: -Josue-
